steps.title: Use the proof clue
steps.content: The sentence says the researchers "proved this idea wrong by" doing something. The blank must name an action that establishes or shows a fact clearly.

steps.title: Select the evidence word
steps.content: Choice A contradicts the idea of proving because pretending is not showing evidence. Choice B is unrelated to proof, and choice C means demanding rather than showing. The remaining word means showing or proving clearly, which fits the researchers establishing three distinct species of electric eels. The answer is D.
